# Fogg's Water Taxi & Charters

> Public boat tours, sunset cruises, private charters, and on-demand water taxi service on Casco Bay in Portland, Maine, departing from Maine Wharf, 72 Commercial Street.

Fogg's Water Taxi & Charters operates two large-capacity vessels — the Casco Bay Cat and the UB-85 Joseph S. Kennedy — plus smaller water taxis, running scenic boat tours past Portland's working waterfront, historic lighthouses, forts, and offshore islands.

## Public Boat Tours & Cruises
- [Public Cruises overview](https://foggswatertaxi.com/cruises): all ticketed public boat tours, schedules, and booking links
- [Sunset Boat Tour](https://foggswatertaxi.com/sunset): 90-minute sunset cruise on the UB-85, Thu–Sat, June–September
- [Beer, Wine & Oysters Boat Tour](https://foggswatertaxi.com/bwoc): all-inclusive harbor tour with local oysters, beer, and wine, Fri–Sun, June–September
- [Wednesday Night Live Music Boat Tour](https://foggswatertaxi.com/livemusic): 2-hour BYOB cruise with live local music every Wednesday, June–September
- [Midday on the Bay Boat Tour](https://foggswatertaxi.com/midday): 90-minute midday cruise past historic forts and lighthouses, Thu–Sun, June–September

## Water Taxi & Charters
- [Water Taxi](https://foggswatertaxi.com/taxi): on-demand rides to Peaks Island, Diamond Cove, Great Diamond Island, Fort Gorges, and more
- [Private Charters](https://foggswatertaxi.com/charters): custom charters for weddings, corporate events, and group outings
- [Trip Ideas](https://foggswatertaxi.com/tripIdeas): destination guide for islands and landmarks on Casco Bay
- [Our Fleet](https://foggswatertaxi.com/ourfleet): vessel specifications and capacities

## About
- [FAQ](https://foggswatertaxi.com/faq)
- [About Us](https://foggswatertaxi.com/aboutus)
- [Contact](https://foggswatertaxi.com/contact): 207-415-8493, reservations@foggswatertaxi.com, 72 Commercial Street, Portland, ME 04101
